evals.name: generate manifest for user profile service
evals.prompt:
I need to produce a plan-manifest.json for a User Profile Service feature. Read the attached feature description file and generate a complete plan-manifest.json.

The feature description: evals/files/feature-descriptions/user-profile-service.md

The manifest must follow this schema:
- manifestVersion: 1
- planSummary: brief description of the feature
- createdAt: current ISO-8601 timestamp
- checkpoints: array of verification checkpoints

Checkpoint types to include:
1. Structural: fileExists for each new file (src/services/user-profile-service.ts, src/routes/user-profile-routes.ts, src/types/user-profile.ts)
2. Structural: exportExists for UserProfileService class, UserProfile type/interface
3. Structural: functionExists for exported functions (getProfile, updateProfile, uploadAvatar if exported standalone)
4. Behavioral: validatesInput for getProfile, updateProfile, uploadAvatar methods
5. Behavioral: handlesError for database error handling in the service methods
6. Structural: routeExists for the API endpoints (GET /api/users/:id, PUT /api/users/:id, POST /api/users/:id/avatar)

Use dependsOn to express ordering: file existence checks should be dependencies of export/behavioral checks within that file.

Return the complete JSON plan-manifest. Make sure checkpoint IDs follow CP-NNN format (CP-001, CP-002, ...).
evals.expected_output: The output contains a valid JSON plan-manifest with at least 10 checkpoints. It includes fileExists checkpoints for the 3 new files, exportExists for UserProfileService and UserProfile, routeExists for the 3 API endpoints, validatesInput for the service methods, and handlesError for database errors. Structural checkpoints should be ordered before behavioral ones. Dependency ordering is correct (fileExists → exportExists → behavioral).
assertions: The output is a valid JSON object with manifestVersion, planSummary, createdAt, and checkpoints fields.
The manifest includes a fileExists checkpoint for src/services/user-profile-service.ts.
The manifest includes a fileExists checkpoint for src/routes/user-profile-routes.ts.
The manifest includes a fileExists checkpoint for src/types/user-profile.ts.
The manifest includes an exportExists or classExists checkpoint for UserProfileService.
The manifest includes a typeExists or exportExists checkpoint for UserProfile.
The manifest includes a validatesInput behavioral checkpoint.
The manifest includes a handlesError behavioral checkpoint.
The manifest includes at least one routeExists checkpoint.
Checkpoint IDs follow the CP-NNN format (e.g., CP-001, CP-002).
Structural checkpoints use dependsOn to reference their prerequisite fileExists, exportExists, classExists, or methodExists checkpoints.
The planSummary describes the user profile service feature.

evals.name: generate manifest for auth middleware
evals.prompt:
Read the attached feature description and produce a plan-manifest.json for the Authentication Middleware feature.

Feature description: evals/files/feature-descriptions/auth-middleware.md

Follow the standard plan manifest schema with manifestVersion: 1. Include both structural and behavioral checkpoints.

This feature involves:
- Modifying an existing file: src/middleware/auth.ts (add authenticate middleware)
- Creating a new file: src/types/auth.ts (AuthPayload type)
- The authenticate function must handle errors (invalid/expired token)
- The authenticate function must validate the Authorization header format

Use dependsOn to express ordering correctly.

Return only the complete plan-manifest JSON.
evals.expected_output: The output contains a valid JSON plan-manifest with checkpoints for: fileExists for src/types/auth.ts (new file), exportExists for authenticate and AuthPayload, handlesError for token validation errors, validatesInput for Authorization header format. Checkpoints for the existing file src/middleware/auth.ts should reference it as the target.
assertions: The output is a valid JSON object with manifestVersion: 1.
The manifest includes a fileExists checkpoint for src/types/auth.ts (the new file).
The manifest includes an exportExists or functionExists checkpoint for authenticate.
The manifest includes a typeExists or exportExists checkpoint for AuthPayload.
The manifest includes at least one handlesError behavioral checkpoint for token validation.
The manifest includes at least one validatesInput behavioral checkpoint for header validation.
The manifest references src/middleware/auth.ts as a target in at least one checkpoint.
Checkpoint IDs follow the CP-NNN format.
Behavioral checkpoints have dependsOn referencing their prerequisite structural checkpoints.
The planSummary describes the authentication middleware feature.

evals.name: generate manifest for notification system
evals.prompt:
Read the attached feature description and produce a complete plan-manifest.json for the Notification System feature.

Feature description: evals/files/feature-descriptions/notification-system.md

This is a complex feature with multiple files, methods, and API routes. Include:

Structural checkpoints:
- fileExists for all 3 new files (src/services/notification-service.ts, src/routes/notification-routes.ts, src/types/notification.ts)
- exportExists for NotificationService class
- typeExists for Notification type/interface
- functionExists for any exported standalone functions
- routeExists for all 5 API routes (GET /api/notifications, POST /api/notifications, PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read, PATCH /api/notifications/read-all, GET /api/notifications/unread-count)

Behavioral checkpoints:
- validatesInput for sendNotification, getNotifications methods
- handlesError for database error handling in all write methods

Use dependsOn to express ordering correctly. Return only the complete JSON.
evals.expected_output: The output contains a valid JSON plan-manifest with at least 14 checkpoints covering all 3 files, all 5 methods, and all 5 API routes. Structural checkpoints are grouped first, behavioral second. Dependency chains are correct.
assertions: The output is a valid JSON object with manifestVersion: 1.
The manifest includes a fileExists checkpoint for src/services/notification-service.ts.
The manifest includes a fileExists checkpoint for src/routes/notification-routes.ts.
The manifest includes a fileExists checkpoint for src/types/notification.ts.
The manifest includes an exportExists checkpoint for NotificationService.
The manifest includes a typeExists or exportExists checkpoint for Notification.
The manifest includes at least 3 routeExists checkpoints (for the API routes).
The manifest includes at least one validatesInput behavioral checkpoint.
The manifest includes at least one handlesError behavioral checkpoint.
All structural checkpoints use type: "structural" and all behavioral checkpoints use type: "behavioral".
Checkpoint IDs follow the CP-NNN format and are numbered sequentially.
Behavioral checkpoints have dependsOn referencing prerequisite fileExists, exportExists, classExists, or methodExists checkpoints.
The planSummary describes the notification system feature.
The manifest has at least 10 checkpoints total (complex feature needs thorough coverage).
